rationale: The cited paper appears conceptually central rather than incidental: it shows that prior relational experience can amplify negative effects in the satisfaction-to-loyalty process, which closely parallels the citing paper’s core “dark side” claim that commitment can amplify switching intentions under severe misbehavior. Both notes focus on B2B relationship dynamics and defection/loyalty translation under adverse conditions, suggesting plausible use as a theory/mechanism source. With a confirmed DOI match, this pair should be retained for full relation judgment.
